name: Crockpot Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour with salt; coat chicken thoroughly.
2. Brown chicken pieces in oil and drain.
3. Stir together lemonade, sugar, catsup, and water.
4. Place chicken in crockpot and pour lemonade mixture over it (the chicken, not the crockpot).
5. Cook on high for 3 to 4 hours.
6. Drain liquid into a saucepan; add cornstarch and boil until reduced.
7. Pour gravy back over chicken; serve over rice.
